pr.title: Record: Fast Full-Rescore N-gram — val_bpb 0.09420444 (3-seed mean)

output.summary: Score-first N-gram eval caches pass1 token stats to rerank every chunk without another neural pass, plus self-exclude/confidence knobs for robustness.
techniques: Score-first pass stores per-token stats for full rescore
Full N-gram cache reused to rerank all chunks without second neural pass
Configurable self-exclude and confidence gain controls
